recommendations.title: Fix the 'NoneType' object error

recommendations.title: Update Playwright API usage
recommendations.detail: Ensure consistent use of Playwright Async API instead of Sync API within asyncio loops.

recommendations.title: Conduct thorough testing

comparative.overall_assessment: The current state of the application presents critical technical issues that prevent successful exploration by different demographic agents. Immediate attention is required to resolve these errors to enable proper engagement and assessment.
